Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk

Interface ChzzkChatEventListener

public interface ChzzkChatEventListener
Listener interface for receiving chat events.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(ChzzkChat chat)
    Called when the broadcast ends.
    default void
    onChangeDonationActive(ChangeDonationActiveEvent event)
    Called when a donation activation state change event is received.
    default void
    onChat(ChatMessage msg)
    Called when a normal chat message is received.
    default void
    onConnect(ChzzkChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
    Called when connected to the chat server.
    default void
    onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
    Called when the connection to the chat server is closed.
    default void
    onDonationChat(DonationMessage msg)
    Called when a donation chat message is received.
    default void
    onError(Exception ex)
    Called when an error occurs.
    default void
    onIimsPenalty(IimsPenaltyEvent event)
    Called when an IIMS penalty event is received.
    default void
    onMissionDonation(MissionDonationMessage msg)
    Called when a mission donation event is received.
    default void
    onMissionDonationChat(MissionDonationMessage msg)
    Called when a mission donation chat message is received.
    default void
    onMissionDonationParticipation(MissionParticipationDonationMessage msg)
    Called when a mission participation donation event is received.
    default void
    onPartyDonationChat(PartyDonationMessage msg)
    Called when a party donation chat message is received.
    default void
    onPartyDonationConfirm(PartyDonationConfirmEvent event)
    Called when a party donation confirm event is received.
    default void
    onPartyDonationFinish(PartyDonationFinishEvent event)
    Called when a party donation finish event is received.
    default void
    onPartyDonationInfo(PartyDonationInfo info)
    Called when a party donation info event is received.
    default void
    onSubscriptionChat(SubscriptionMessage msg)
    Called when a subscription chat message is received.
    default void
    onSubscriptionGift(SubscriptionGiftEvent event)
    Called when a subscription gift event is received.
    default void
    onSubscriptionGiftReceiver(SubscriptionGiftReceiverEvent event)
    Called when a subscription gift receiver event is received.
    default void
    onSystemMessage(ChatMessage msg)
    Called when a system message is received (msgTypeCode=30).
    default void
    onTemporaryRestrict(TemporaryRestrictEvent event)
    Called when a temporary restriction event is received.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(ChzzkChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
      Called when connected to the chat server.
      Parameters:
      chat - connected chat instance
      isReconnecting - whether this is a reconnection

    • onConnectionClosed

      default void onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
      Called when the connection to the chat server is closed.
      Parameters:
      code - close code
      reason - close reason
      remote - whether it was closed remotely
      tryingToReconnect - whether reconnection is being attempted

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(ChzzkChat chat)
      Called when the broadcast ends. Broadcast end is detected by polling live status every 30 seconds.
      Parameters:
      chat - chat instance

    • onError

      default void onError(Exception ex)
      Called when an error occurs.
      Parameters:
      ex - occurred exception

    • onChat

      default void onChat(ChatMessage msg)
      Called when a normal chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received chat message

    • onSystemMessage

      default void onSystemMessage(ChatMessage msg)
      Called when a system message is received (msgTypeCode=30).
      Parameters:
      msg - received system message

    • onDonationChat

      default void onDonationChat(DonationMessage msg)
      Called when a donation chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received donation message

    • onMissionDonationChat

      default void onMissionDonationChat(MissionDonationMessage msg)
      Called when a mission donation chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received mission donation message

    • onPartyDonationChat

      default void onPartyDonationChat(PartyDonationMessage msg)
      Called when a party donation chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received party donation message

    • onSubscriptionChat

      default void onSubscriptionChat(SubscriptionMessage msg)
      Called when a subscription chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received subscription message

    • onMissionDonation

      default void onMissionDonation(MissionDonationMessage msg)
      Called when a mission donation event is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received mission donation message

    • onMissionDonationParticipation

      default void onMissionDonationParticipation(MissionParticipationDonationMessage msg)
      Called when a mission participation donation event is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received mission participation donation message

    • onPartyDonationInfo

      default void onPartyDonationInfo(PartyDonationInfo info)
      Called when a party donation info event is received.
      Parameters:
      info - party donation information

    • onSubscriptionGift

      default void onSubscriptionGift(SubscriptionGiftEvent event)
      Called when a subscription gift event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - subscription gift event

    • onSubscriptionGiftReceiver

      default void onSubscriptionGiftReceiver(SubscriptionGiftReceiverEvent event)
      Called when a subscription gift receiver event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - subscription gift receiver event

    • onTemporaryRestrict

      default void onTemporaryRestrict(TemporaryRestrictEvent event)
      Called when a temporary restriction event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - temporary restriction event

    • onChangeDonationActive

      default void onChangeDonationActive(ChangeDonationActiveEvent event)
      Called when a donation activation state change event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - donation activation state change event

    • onPartyDonationFinish

      default void onPartyDonationFinish(PartyDonationFinishEvent event)
      Called when a party donation finish event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - party donation finish event

    • onPartyDonationConfirm

      default void onPartyDonationConfirm(PartyDonationConfirmEvent event)
      Called when a party donation confirm event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - party donation confirm event

    • onIimsPenalty

      default void onIimsPenalty(IimsPenaltyEvent event)
      Called when an IIMS penalty event is received.
      Parameters:
      event - IIMS penalty event
